summary: PWA transformation testing completed. All core PWA features (manifest, service worker, offline page, icons) working correctly. Mobile layout responsive with proper viewport configuration. Authentication flow functional but company creation modal overlay issue prevents full PWA mobile navigation testing.

minor_bugs.issue: Inventory validation returning unexpected status code for oversale attempts
minor_bugs.impact: Stock validation test failed - should return 400 for insufficient stock

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay intercepting button clicks preventing company creation completion
ui_bugs.impact: Blocks access to PWA bottom navigation and FAB features which require company setup

integration_issues.issue: Bottom navigation and FAB button inaccessible due to company creation modal overlay blocking workflow

passed_tests: PWA manifest accessible at /manifest.json with proper configuration
Service worker accessible at /sw.js with caching and offline support
Offline page accessible at /offline.html with retry functionality
Mobile viewport meta tag properly configured
Service worker registration working in browser
User registration and login authentication flow
Mobile responsive layout with proper fonts
PWA manifest linked correctly in HTML head
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix company creation modal overlay z-index issue. The DialogOverlay is intercepting button clicks preventing company creation completion. This blocks testing of key PWA mobile features (bottom navigation, FAB button, tab navigation) as they require company setup. All PWA core components (manifest, service worker, offline page) are working correctly.

success_percentage.frontend: 75% (PWA core features working, mobile layout responsive, but navigation features blocked by modal issue)
success_percentage.pwa_core: 100% (manifest, service worker, offline page, icons all working)
